description_long: This kiosk consists of a tall, rectangular vertical panel with a geometric blue pattern and a printed sign reading 'EZTUBE CONNECT 60in STRAIGHT-96'. The panel is supported by two flat, rectangular metal feet at the base, which rest on a wooden platform with a light brown, plank-style finish. The structure appears lightweight and portable, designed for temporary installation in public or commercial spaces. The front face is used for branding or informational signage, while the back is plain and unadorned. There are no visible windows, doors, or interactive components beyond the signage.
description: A tall, blue geometric-patterned kiosk panel with printed signage, supported by metal feet on a wooden platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue geometric panel with clear printed signage and a person for scale.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the panel and the supporting metal feet on the wooden platform.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the panel and the full width of the wooden platform.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the panel's slimness and the unobstructed wooden platform.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign on front panel, geometric blue background, text: 'EZTUBE CONNECT 60in STRAIGHT-96'
attribute_roof_design: flat, no overhang, same material and pattern as main panel
